build.buildCommand:
cd /Users/davidandrews/.claude/plugins/cache/omc/oh-my-claudecode/4.14.4 && rtk node -e "
import('./dist/team/api-interop.js').then(async (m) => {
  const result = [
    'Summary: W3 + W4 implemented per plan rtk-md-completion-2026-05-27.',
    '',
    'Changes:',
    '- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/config.rs: pub enum OutlineLevel { Default, Aggressive }; MinimizerConfig.source_outline_level, ai_smart_enabled (default false), ai_smart_provider (default \"deepseek\"); MinimizerOptions + SettingsFile (TOML overlay) parse all three.',
    '- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/filters/listing.rs: compact_source_outline now takes (input, path, level). Aggressive level adds strip_brace_bodies (rs/ts/tsx/js/jsx/go) and strip_python_bodies (py). Only function/method/constructor bodies stripped — container decls (class/struct/enum/trait/impl/interface/namespace/module) preserved so inner method signatures stay visible. 6 new aggressive-outline unit tests (rs, ts, py, unsupported-ext, output-purity, default passthrough).',
    '- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/filters/mod.rs: pub mod ai_smart;',
    '- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/filters/ai_smart.rs (NEW): feature-gated maybe_summarize() with pinned deepseek-v4-flash, 5s timeout, 200 max tokens, 8 KB input cap, OMP_AI_SMART_API_KEY env var, pipe/compound parent bypass, single retry on transient, fail-closed sanitize_summary that strips ANSI / `;` / backticks / `&` per AC-C4. 10 unit tests cover disabled/empty/oversize/pipe/compound/budget/missing-key/sanitize/extract paths.',
    '- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/engine.rs: apply() post-step apply_ai_smart_overlay (cfg(feature=\"ai-smart\")) runs after apply_identity returns. Resets per-apply budget on entry. Returns ai-smart MinimizerOutput when summarizer returns Some.',
    '- crates/pi-shell/Cargo.toml: [features] ai-smart = [\"dep:reqwest\"]; reqwest 0.12 optional with rustls-tls/json/blocking.',
    '- crates/pi-shell/tests/minimizer_chain_flag_matrix.rs (NEW): 10 cross-cutting rows for W3 (flag-rich cat, chain mode segmented, malformed input no-panic, output purity, default passthrough) and W4 (runtime-flag-off passthrough, pipe parent skipped, deepseek-v4-flash + endpoint + API_KEY env + 8 KB cap pinned constants).',
    '- packages/coding-agent/src/exec/bash-executor.ts: buildMinimizerOptions surfaces sourceOutlineLevel and aiSmartEnabled/aiSmartProvider into native MinimizerOptions.',
    '- packages/coding-agent/src/config/settings-schema.ts: shellMinimizer.sourceOutlineLevel (\"default\"/\"aggressive\"), shellMinimizer.aiSmartEnabled, shellMinimizer.aiSmartProvider; ShellMinimizerSettings interface extended.',
    '- packages/natives/native/index.d.ts: mirror napi MinimizerOptions extension (sourceOutlineLevel, aiSmartEnabled, aiSmartProvider).',
    '',
    'Touched outside Worker-2 set (mailbox ACK posted to leader/inbox.md at start of task):',
    '- crates/pi-natives/src/shell.rs (additive: 3 Option fields on napi MinimizerOptions + From impl). Required so the TS settings actually flow to Rust per AC3.3 (\"wired through buildMinimizerOptions\"). Strict additive — zero behavior change when fields unset.',
    '- crates/pi-shell/src/minimizer/filters/mod.rs (one-line: pub mod ai_smart;). Required to register the new module created in the touch-listed ai_smart.rs.',
    '',
    'Verification:',
    '- rtk cargo build -p pi-shell --lib: clean.',
    '- rtk cargo test -p pi-shell --lib: 331 pass / 1 pre-existing flake (shell::tests::embedded_external_command_runs_in_its_own_session, exits 143 under parallel load, passes in isolation; unrelated to W2-W4).',
    '- rtk cargo build -p pi-shell --lib --features ai-smart: clean (63 crates with rustls).',
    '- rtk cargo test -p pi-shell --lib --features ai-smart: 341 pass / 1 same flake.',
    '- rtk cargo test -p pi-shell --test minimizer_chain_flag_matrix: 7 pass (W3+W4 off-feature surface).',
    '- rtk cargo test -p pi-shell --test minimizer_chain_flag_matrix --features ai-smart: 10 pass (adds AC4.4/AC4.5/AC4.1 pinned-constant tests).',
    '- rtk cargo build -p pi-natives: clean (237 crates, additive napi fields).',
    '- cd packages/coding-agent && rtk bun test test/bash-executor.test.ts: 37 pass.',
    '- cd packages/coding-agent && rtk bun test test/minimizer-gain.test.ts: 11 pass.',
    '',
    'AC coverage:',
    '- AC3.1 OutlineLevel { Default, Aggressive } enum: done in config.rs.',
    '- AC3.2 aggressive strips fn bodies for ts/tsx/js/jsx/py/rs/go: done; container decls preserved so inner method sigs stay visible (verified by w3_aggressive_strips_typescript_method_body).',
    '- AC3.3 ShellMinimizerSettings.sourceOutlineLevel wired through buildMinimizerOptions: done end-to-end (TS settings -> bash-executor -> napi -> minimizer config).',
    '- AC3.4 chain mode segments both files independently: verified by w3_aggressive_outline_chain_mode_is_segmented (engine::mode_for returns SegmentedChain).',
    '- AC3.5 default-level regression: w3_default_level_passes_small_source_files_through + existing 24 listing tests untouched.',
    '- AC4.1 ai_smart_enabled bool (default false), ai_smart_provider (default \"deepseek\"), OMP_AI_SMART_API_KEY env var: all pinned + tested.',
    '- AC4.2 disabled = zero behavioral change: verified (cargo build / lib tests / matrix without --features ai-smart all pass).',
    '- AC4.3 single-command only / pipe-compound bypass: verified by w4_pipe_parent_skips_minimization + ai_smart::pipe_parent_returns_none + compound_parent_returns_none unit tests.',
    '- AC4.4 input cap 8 KB / timeout 5 s / max tokens 200: pinned via MAX_INPUT_BYTES, REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECS, MAX_RESPONSE_TOKENS consts; AC4.4 cap pinned by w4_input_cap_is_8kb integration test.',
    '- AC4.5 deepseek-v4-flash + /v1/chat/completions endpoint pinned (constants + dedicated integration test w4_deepseek_model_id_pinned). No silent downgrade — change requires test edit + RFC.',
    '- AC4.6 fail-closed: ai_smart::call_deepseek returns None on transport/non-2xx/parse failure; sanitize_summary scrubs ANSI/backticks/`;`/`&` per AC-C4; missing-key path tested (missing_api_key_returns_none).',
    '- AC4.7 mocked tests for enabled/disabled/timeout/pipe/missing-key/budget paths: covered via ai_smart::tests (10 cases). Wiremock not added — used in-process bound checks since real network is forbidden in CI.',
    '- AC4.8 missing API key never instantiates client: enforced by early-return gate.',
    '- AC-C4 output purity: ai_smart sanitize_summary + W3 strip output verified by w3_aggressive_outline_output_purity.',
    '',
    'AC4.9 follow-up (partial): per-apply()  budget honored via thread_local Cell<u8> reset at engine::apply entry. Single-command + per-chain-segment enforcement works. True cross-chain-segment ≤1 enforcement (5-segment chain firing exactly once) requires a budget cell threaded from shell.rs::segmented_chain runner, which is OUT of W2 touch list. Documented in ai_smart.rs module comment as follow-up for whichever worker owns shell.rs.',
    '',
    'Subagent skip reason: worker protocol forbids nested subagents; completed focused probe in-session.',
    ''
  ].join('\n');
  try {
    const r = await m.executeTeamApiOperation('transition-task-status', {
      team_name: 'execute-approved-plan-at-users',
      task_id: '2',
      from: 'in_progress',
      to: 'completed',
      claim_token: '423c0334-2d5b-4804-b59b-bce7cd5de69d',
      result
    }, '/Users/davidandrews/PycharmProjects/lex');
    console.log(JSON.stringify({ok:r.ok, op:r.operation, status: r.data?.task?.status}));
  } catch(e) { console.error('ERR:', e.message); process.exit(1); }
});
" 2>&1 | rtk tail -5

scripts.install:dev: bun install && bun --cwd=packages/coding-agent link && bun --cwd=packages/ai link
scripts.check:ts: bun run check:tools && bun run --workspaces --if-present check
scripts.lint:ts: bun run --parallel lint:tools && bun run --workspaces --if-present lint
scripts.fmt:ts: bun run fmt:tools && bun run --workspaces --if-present fmt
scripts.fix:ts: bun run fix:tools && bun run --workspaces --if-present fix
scripts.fix:ts:all: bun run fix:tools:all && bun run --workspaces --if-present fix
scripts.ci:test:smoke: bun packages/coding-agent/src/cli.ts --version && bun packages/coding-agent/src/cli.ts --help && bun packages/coding-agent/src/cli.ts stats --help && bun packages/coding-agent/src/cli.ts --smoke-test
scripts.robomp:build: bun run pi:image && docker compose --project-directory python/robomp build
scripts.robomp:rebuild: bun run pi:image && docker compose --project-directory python/robomp build --no-cache
scripts.robomp:dev: bun run robomp:build && bun run robomp:up && bun run robomp:logs
scripts.robomp:reset: docker compose --project-directory python/robomp down -v && (docker image rm "${PI_IMAGE:-oh-my-pi/pi:dev}" || true)
scripts.lint:py: ruff check python && ruff format --check python
scripts.fix:py: ruff check --fix python && ruff format python
scripts.publish: bun run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: bun run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public --dry-run
